---
title: "Reference"
---

The reference section is generated from structured data. Use it to browse the canon by house, spell, stack, cast level, and failure mode.

- [Guided Reader Path](../reader_path.qmd)
- [Canon Map](canon-map.qmd)
- [Term Index](term-index.qmd)
- [Master Lexicon](lexicon.qmd)

## Lexicon Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 343   |
| stub     | 1302  |

| House                                                                                                                                    | Range     | Entries |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ------- |
| [Architecture, Abstraction, and Design](house-architecture-abstraction-and-design.qmd)                                                   | 0001-0112 | 112     |
| [Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape](house-language-semantics-and-formal-shape.qmd)                                                   | 0113-0249 | 137     |
| [Data, State, and Representation](house-data-state-and-representation.qmd)                                                               | 0250-0371 | 122     |
| [Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs](house-transformation-algorithms-and-working-verbs.qmd)                                   | 0372-0511 | 140     |
| [Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic](house-control-flow-coordination-and-temporal-logic.qmd)                                 | 0512-0608 | 97      |
| [Runtime, Memory, and Execution](house-runtime-memory-and-execution.qmd)                                                                 | 0609-0684 | 76      |
| [Systems Programming and Operating-System Words](house-systems-programming-and-operating-system-words.qmd)                               | 0685-0770 | 86      |
| [Networking and Distributed Systems](house-networking-and-distributed-systems.qmd)                                                       | 0771-0886 | 116     |
| [Databases, Persistence, and Time-Binding Words](house-databases-persistence-and-time-binding-words.qmd)                                 | 0887-0968 | 82      |
| [Security, Trust, and Warding Words](house-security-trust-and-warding-words.qmd)                                                         | 0969-1063 | 95      |
| [Build, Tooling, Versioning, and Release](house-build-tooling-versioning-and-release.qmd)                                                | 1064-1139 | 76      |
| [Testing, Verification, and Observability](house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd)                                             | 1140-1210 | 71      |
| [Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words](house-hardware-embedded-and-performance-near-words.qmd)                                 | 1211-1290 | 80      |
| [Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words](house-interface-ux-and-human-facing-words.qmd)                                                   | 1291-1350 | 60      |
| [Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure](house-promptcraft-ai-oriented-engineering-and-spell-structure.qmd)           | 1351-1420 | 70      |
| [Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives](house-guarantee-words-quality-attributes-and-behavioral-adjectives.qmd) | 1421-1512 | 92      |
| [Failure Words, Pathologies, and Counter-Spells](house-failure-words-pathologies-and-counter-spells.qmd)                                 | 1513-1582 | 70      |
| [Compound Forms, Prefixes, Suffixes, and Naming Runes](house-compound-forms-prefixes-suffixes-and-naming-runes.qmd)                      | 1583-1645 | 63      |
